mapper.sql: id, device_id, name, status, firmware_version, owner_id, last_seen_at, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM devices ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT
FROM devices WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT
FROM devices WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO devices (device_id, name, status, firmware_version, owner_id, last_seen_at) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{name}, #{status}, #{firmwareVersion}, #{ownerId}, #{lastSeenAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE devices SET name = #{name}, status = #{status}, firmware_version = #{firmwareVersion}, owner_id = #{ownerId}, last_seen_at = #{lastSeenAt} WHERE device_id = #{deviceId}
